name.en: Rol Único Tributario de Chile (Taxpayer Number)

description.en:
Any company that will be subject to taxes in Chile must obtain a Rol Único Tributario (RUT).  

A RUT has 7 or 8 digits, plus a check digit. Identifiers should be presented without any punctuation and including the check digit. 

The Servicio de Impuestos Internos (SII) is the official tax authority responsible for issuing the RUT in Chile. It is essential for individuals and businesses to register with the SII to obtain their tax number.

access.guidanceOnLocatingIds: There is no free public search of RUT numbers provided by the official tax agency. Secondary sites, such as https://www.registrodeempresasysociedades.cl/BuscarActuaciones2.aspx, may help check the validity of a RUT number.
